Summary: Build executive decision cockpit with risk and constraints scoring
Description: Create executive decision cockpit for active search tradeoffs, role-fit evaluation, and irreversible decision framing. Include weighted what-matters criteria (for example: location, family impact, base and total compensation, industry fit, brand impact, lifestyle, timing) plus user-defined custom factors for target and offer comparison. Distinguish hard constraints from weighted preferences so must-have gates can disqualify targets and offers before weighted scoring. Capture pre-interview and post-interview thoughts with perceived-fit deltas, confidence deltas, and objection notes by stakeholder audience. Acceptance Criteria: cockpit surfaces decision owner, confidence, blockers, next irreversible choice, weighted fit score, weighted risk score, explicit tradeoff notes, must-have gate status, pre/post interview reflections, and target rankings both overall and by criteria.
